title: Malformed downstream responses fail closed at the proven boundary

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
The adapter can return malformed read data before mutation and malformed ATX data after a proven wire write.
The harness provisions each linked tool call with its valid owned session, required capability, and a separately captured fresh observation when the handler consumes one.

fault_script.action: Return a malformed downstream response to each linked tool at a recorded pre-write or post-write boundary.
fault_script.expected_effect: Each response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the write boundary, never as success.

steps.expect: A closed failure with no successful display payload.
unknown at the acknowledgement boundary with no replay.
The malformed jetkvm_display_capture response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.
The malformed jetkvm_display_status response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.
The malformed jetkvm_input_keyboard response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.
The malformed jetkvm_input_mouse response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.
The malformed jetkvm_input_paste response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.
The malformed jetkvm_input_release response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.
The malformed jetkvm_power_control response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.
The malformed jetkvm_session_connect response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.
The malformed jetkvm_session_reconnect response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.
The malformed jetkvm_session_status response fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the recorded write boundary, with no fabricated success.

pass.assertion: Malformed downstream data fails closed as not_sent or unknown according to the proven write boundary.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

restore.action: Restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline using the reviewed fixture procedure while retaining the device lease.
restore.assertion: The baseline ATX-observable state is proven before the next story starts.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
